defaults.senderTitle: Computer Science student at the University of Bath
defaults.subject: {name}, quick question

healthcare-scheduling.summary: Recently built a scheduling and capacity system for a healthcare provider managing staff across multiple sites
healthcare-scheduling.result: Cut their daily coordination time by about 8 hours a week

events-booking.summary: Just finished a booking engine and back-office platform for an events company - scheduling, team management, customer portal
events-booking.result: Cut their admin by about 10 hours a week

coffee-automation.summary: Built an AI customer service agent for a coffee roaster - handles enquiries, bookings, and review management automatically
coffee-automation.result: Freed up about 15 hours a week of staff time

ops-platform.summary: Recently built an ops platform for an environmental brokerage company - document workflows, deadline tracking, audit trails across dozens of concurrent projects
ops-platform.result: Saved about 12 hours a week on admin
